prompt: I'm running `/loop /fix-grype-tf` on my machine. For this tick, check whether there's a recent failed run of the `Grype Org Scan` workflow in Techfolk-AS/.github. If everything is green (latest run succeeded), report a one-line no-op and stop — do not bump anything, don't clone repos, don't open PRs. If something is failing, list the affected repos and stop with a plan (still don't push).

assertions.text: Correctly identifies latest run as green / successful
Does not propose any package bumps or PRs
Did not clone repos or perform git mutations
